title: selaginella mittenii
intro: Selaginella mittenii, also known as Mitten's spikemoss, is a species of evergreen, perennial plant in the family Selaginellaceae. It is a type of ancient plant, with a history dating back to the time of the dinosaurs, and is found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella mittenii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, and it can be prepared as a tea or tincture for consumption.
